description: PID v2 — asymmetric mixer, recomputed trim for 90° tilt + 0 airspeed hover

trim.description: Recomputed for 90° tilt, zero airspeed. W=160 lbf, T0=80 lbf/motor, fwd arm +3.10 ft, aft arm -4.90 ft. Torque+lift balance: T_fwd=49.0 lbf, T_aft=31.0 lbf.
trim._note_lift_balance: = sin(fwd_tilt). At 90° tilt, sin(90°)=1.0. When pitch loop adds delta to fwd, subtract same delta from aft to keep total lift constant.

safety.description: Per-tick output limits to keep motors in safe regime
safety._note_ramp: For first ramp_in_seconds, blend controller output with pure trim. Prevents a startup-transient kick from saturating motors.
safety._note_warmup: For first warmup_seconds, hold the vehicle INITIAL state as setpoint (instead of schedule). Lets all loops start at zero error.

climb_rate._note: climb rate error (ft/s) -> collective throttle delta

u_velocity._note: DISABLED for 90° tilt — no forward-push disturbance to compensate for. Re-enable if vehicle drifts fwd/back at steady state.

yaw_attitude._note: Yaw control is weak in hover (no rudder authority, no rotor torque).

setpoints.description: With true 90° tilt + zero airspeed, natural hover theta is 0°.
